message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title PB-749 UC4 – Update a Banner on System Management

actor "System Management" as SM
rectangle "Next Platform" {
    participant "Core Next" as CN
    database "Next Database" as DB
}
participant "Core Bradesco" as CB

note over SM,CN:Abstract:\nThis use case will be responsible to update an existing banner on Next.\nThis endpoint is not responsible for deleting a record. To do this, it\nmust use the use case 5 – Delete a Banner on System Management.\nHowever, in this use case, SM may enable or disable Banner.

SM -> CN: 1 PUT /v1/notification/banner/{bannerID}
activate CN
note right of SM:System Management will call this new endpoint\npassing all the fields necessary to update an\nexisting Banner. The fields are:\n1. BANNER_ID\n2. BUSINESS_EVENT_TYPE_ID\n3. TEMPLATE_HEADER\n4. TEMPLATE_BODY\n5. ENABLE_IND

CN -> DB: 2 check if this Banner exists on BANNER table
activate DB
note right of CN:Core Next will check if this Banner exists on BANNER table
DB --> CN: 3 response
deactivate DB

alt [if the Banner exists]
    CN -> DB: 4 check if exists an enabled Banner associated with that BUSINESS_EVENT_TYPE received on requisition on BANNER table
    activate DB
    note orange right of CN:Note to developers\nCore Next will check if exists any Banner linked to a BUSINESS_EVENT_TYPE on BANNER\ntable. We can only have one enabled Banner linked to a BUSINESS_EVENT_TYPE. For this\nrule, we should disregard the records that are with DELETE_FLG enabled and the Card itself.
    DB --> CN: 5 response
    deactivate DB
    
    alt [if exists an enabled Banner associated with that BUSINESS_EVENT_TYPE]
        CN --> SM: 6 error
        note left of SM:#FFCCCC<<HTTP code: 422>>
    else [if don't exists an enabled Banner associated with that BUSINESS_EVENT_TYPE]
        note right of CN:If the defensive checks pass, then we will update the register on BANNER table.
        CN -> DB: 7 update the register on BANNER table
        activate DB
        DB --> CN: 8 success
        deactivate DB
        CN --> SM: 9 success
        note left of SM:#ADD8E6<<HTTP code: 200>>
    end
else [if the Banner don't exists]
    CN --> SM: 10 error
    note left of SM:#FFCCCC<<If the Banner don't exists on BANNER table, then we will throw back an error to SM.\nHTTP code: 404>>
end

deactivate CN
@enduml
```
